name: Cascadeur
description: AI-assisted 3D animation tool by Nekki for creating physically plausible keyframe animation. AutoPhysics and AutoPosing tools reduce manual tweaking for game characters.

seo.title: Cascadeur — Game Development Tools
seo.meta_description: Cascadeur: AI-assisted 3D animation tool by Nekki for creating physically plausible keyframe animation. AutoPhysics and AutoPosing tools reduce manual tweaking

when_to_use: Game character jump animation with AutoPhysics overlap fix
Rapid keyframe blocking for NPC locomotion cycle
Physically plausible combat animations exported to Unreal
Secondary motion added to hair and clothing automatically
Quick pose library for hero character action stances

pros: AutoPhysics produces plausible secondary motion quickly
AutoPosing speeds keyframe roughing for biped characters
Free tier is generous for indie and hobby projects
FBX round-trip works with Unity, Unreal, and Maya
cons: AI tools struggle with non-humanoid or quadruped rigs
Not a full animation suite, still need Maya or Blender
Learning curve on its physics model is real
Pro licensing gets expensive for small teams
review.verdict: Physics-aware AI animation that genuinely saves time on human characters; niche outside that use case.
review.best_for: Animators creating physically plausible humanoid action for games
review.not_for: Rigging quadrupeds, creatures, or fully procedural animation systems
